examples: Some of us may have some Paperwhite Narcissus bulbs in bloom and their highly scented white flower clusters can lift the spirits.
Text on the Kindle Paperwhite is darker and crisper than what I've seen on previous-generation Kindles.
One thing I would've liked to have seen on the Paperwhite: physical page-turn buttons.
Even without buttons, the physical execution of the Paperwhite puts it ahead of the competition.
